title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA WEST MEDFORD HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for the entire family. Services include well baby/child check-ups, annual exams/physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, care for chronic conditions, and general medical care. 1307 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 618-1300 Main phone (541) 535-6239 After-hours Nurse (541) 618-1328 Alternate Care Team Main phone (541) 618-1300 After-hours nurse (541) 535-6239 Alternate (541) 618-1328 Care Team INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Rogue Valley Transportation District bus stop near clinic Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
